## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte's events (e.g., Snowflake Summit) generate 30% of pipeline; highly successful for leads and brand exposure](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Shifting focus to new articles only for next 30 days, pausing refreshes to cover backlog of new topics](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO to accelerate content production; commercial details to be worked out](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Looker dashboard development ongoing but facing challenges; V1 available but improvements needed](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

## Topics

### Event Marketing Success

  - [Snowflake and Databricks events in San Francisco yielding significant results](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [30% of Airbyte's pipeline comes from events](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Last year's event already paid for itself and generated more](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Comprehensive event presence: booth, wrapped cars, LED track, after-party sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Pausing article refreshes for 30 days to focus solely on new content](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Target: 20 new articles in the coming month](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New topics already listed in main sheet for team to select from](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO to accelerate content production](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Considering blend of editorial approach and programmatic SEO workflow](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### SEO Performance and Strategy

  - [SEO traffic down 20% since January](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Increase in traffic from AI search referrals](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Goal to double down on content production to address traffic decline](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Discussing potential for scaling up content creation significantly (e.g., 200 articles/month)](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### Looker Dashboard Development

  - [V1 of dashboards available but facing technical challenges](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Issues with setting up weekly and monthly views](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [LLM modules can be added to track specific traffic](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Jakub acknowledges frustrations and commits to improvements](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Schema Implementation

  - [Agreement to add schema to refreshed and new blog posts where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Discussing potential for programmatic schema addition to existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Considering template-level schema implementation for efficiency (e.g., FAQ schema)](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Airbyte to share Figma templates for blog post cover images](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Tanmay to review pending articles and add more to the new articles tab](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [GrowthX team to start producing new articles from the provided list](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Jakub to sync with Kyle and Mario regarding programmatic SEO approach and commercial details](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Jakub to continue improving Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Jakub to provide update on use cases for Apache Iceberg early next week](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Team to explore programmatic methods for adding schema to existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Jakub and Tanmay to discuss CMS-level schema implementation options](https://fathom.video/share/8ntxDq8_7zjgP2L2xX6S1jb_pMFr2UYN?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
